title: EPA Tier 4 Final Standards
description: Meet EPA Tier 4 Final emission standards for nonroad diesel engines per 40 CFR 1039.

title: EPA Engine Certification
description: Obtain EPA engine certification with Family Certification Number.

title: EU Stage V Standards
description: Meet EU Stage V emissions standards per Regulation (EU) 2016/1628.

title: EU Stage V Type Approval
description: Obtain EU Stage V type approval for nonroad mobile machinery engines.

title: Euro 7 On-Road Emissions
description: Meet Euro 7 emission standards effective 2026-11-29 for on-road engines.

title: IMO Tier III NOx Standards
description: Meet IMO Tier III NOx limits in ECA zones per MARPOL Annex VI.

title: Energy Efficiency Design Index
description: Meet IMO EEDI requirements for new marine engines.

title: ICAO Annex 16 Vol II Engine Emissions
description: Meet ICAO Annex 16 Vol II aircraft engine emission standards.

title: ICAO Annex 16 Vol I Noise
description: Meet ICAO Annex 16 Vol I aircraft noise certification standards.

title: FAR Part 33 Airworthiness
description: Meet FAR Part 33 airworthiness standards for aircraft engines.

title: EASA CS-E Engine Certification
description: Meet EASA CS-E certification specifications for aircraft engines.

title: ISO 8178 Test Cycles
description: Apply ISO 8178 test cycles (NRSC C1, NRTC) for nonroad engine emissions.

title: ISO 8178 Steady-State Cycles
description: Apply ISO 8178 steady-state cycles (D2, E1, E3) by application.

title: Worldwide Harmonized Transient Cycle
description: Apply WHTC test cycle for heavy-duty engine emission certification.

title: EPA FTP-75 Light-Duty Cycle
description: Apply EPA FTP-75 test cycle for light-duty engine emission certification.

title: AS9100 Aerospace QMS
description: Maintain AS9100 QMS for aerospace engine manufacturing.

title: AS9110 Aerospace MRO
description: Maintain AS9110 QMS for aerospace engine MRO operations.

title: IATF 16949 Automotive Engine QMS
description: Maintain IATF 16949 QMS for automotive engine manufacturing.

title: ISO 9001 Quality Management
description: Establish QMS per ISO 9001 for engine manufacturing operations.

title: Environmental Management System
description: Establish EMS per ISO 14001 for engine production environmental impact.

title: Occupational H&S Management System
description: Establish OHSMS per ISO 45001 for engine manufacturing safety.

title: ISO 50001 Energy Management
description: Establish EnMS per ISO 50001 for engine production energy efficiency.

title: ITAR for Defense Engines
description: Apply ITAR to defense gas turbines and military engine technology.

title: EAR Dual-Use Engine Tech
description: Apply EAR Export Administration Regulations to dual-use engine technology.

title: OFAC Engine Customer Screening
description: Screen engine customers and end-users against OFAC SDN list.

title: REACH for Engine Components
description: Comply with REACH for substances in EU-sold engine components.

title: RoHS for Electronic Engine Controls
description: Apply RoHS to EU-sold electronic engine control modules.

title: OSHA General Industry
description: Apply OSHA general industry standards to engine manufacturing.

title: Machine Guarding for Engine Test Stands
description: Provide OSHA-required machine guarding for engine test stands.

title: OSHA PSM for Engine Test Cells
description: Apply OSHA Process Safety Management to engine test cells with regulated chemicals.

title: API 614 Lubrication Systems
description: Apply API 614 lubrication system standards for industrial machinery.

title: API 610 Centrifugal Pumps
description: Apply API 610 standard for centrifugal pumps in petroleum/industrial service.

title: API 674 Reciprocating Pumps
description: Apply API 674 standard for positive displacement reciprocating pumps.

title: ASME PTC 10 Compressor Performance
description: Apply ASME PTC 10 for centrifugal/axial compressor performance testing.

title: ISO 1217 Displacement Compressor Performance
description: Apply ISO 1217 for displacement compressor performance testing.

title: ISO 10816 Machinery Vibration
description: Apply ISO 10816 for non-rotating-part machinery vibration measurement.

title: ISO 1940 Rotor Balance Quality
description: Apply ISO 1940 rotor balance quality requirements to crankshafts and turbines.

title: ISO 12100 Machinery Risk Assessment
description: Apply ISO 12100 risk assessment for machinery design safety.

title: ISO 22241 DEF Quality
description: Maintain DEF (AdBlue) quality per ISO 22241 specifications.

title: ASTM Fuel Specifications
description: Apply ASTM D975 (diesel), D4814 (gasoline), D7467 (biodiesel blends) fuel specs.

title: API Engine Oil Service Categories
description: Apply API engine oil service categories (CK-4, FA-4, SP) per application.

title: JASO Engine Oil Specs
description: Apply JASO MA/MB specifications for motorcycle engines.

title: ACEA European Oil Sequences
description: Apply ACEA oil sequences (A/B, C, E) for European engine applications.

title: ISO 15016 Ship Performance
description: Apply ISO 15016 for ship sea trial performance assessment.

title: MARPOL Annex VI Compliance
description: Apply MARPOL Annex VI for marine engine air pollution prevention.

title: EU Marine Engine Emissions
description: Comply with EU Directive 97/68/EC for marine engines under 24 m.

title: EWIS Compliance for Aviation Engines
description: Apply EWIS (Electrical Wiring Interconnection System) requirements per FAR 25.1707.

title: Bird Strike Certification
description: Demonstrate engine bird strike capability per FAR 33.76.

title: Engine Containment Certification
description: Demonstrate fan blade containment per FAR 33.94.

title: FOD Prevention Program
description: Maintain Foreign Object Debris prevention program per FAA AC 150/5210-24.

title: FAA Maintenance Records
description: Maintain aviation engine maintenance records per FAR 43.9 and 91.417.

title: EASA Part 145 MRO Approval
description: Maintain EASA Part 145 approval for aviation engine MRO.

title: FAA Part 145 Repair Station
description: Maintain FAA Part 145 repair station certification.

title: NADCAP Special Process Accreditation
description: Maintain NADCAP accreditation for aerospace special processes.

title: MISRA C for Engine Control Software
description: Apply MISRA C:2025 to safety-critical engine control unit software.

title: ISO 26262 for Engine ECUs
description: Apply ISO 26262 functional safety to automotive engine ECU software.

title: DO-178C Aviation Software
description: Apply DO-178C to FADEC and aviation engine control software.

title: DO-254 Aviation Hardware
description: Apply DO-254 to safety-critical aviation engine hardware.

title: ARP 4754A System Development
description: Apply ARP 4754A for aviation engine system development assurance.

title: Conflict Minerals Disclosure
description: Submit Form SD for tin/tantalum/tungsten/gold from DRC region in engine components.

title: UFLPA for Engine Components
description: Verify engine component supply chain does not include Xinjiang-produced goods.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for UK engine operations.

title: FCPA Anti-Bribery
description: Avoid corrupt payments to foreign officials in international engine sales.

title: UK Bribery Act Compliance
description: Maintain adequate procedures to prevent bribery per Section 7.

title: EU Machinery Regulation
description: Comply with EU Machinery Regulation (EU) 2023/1230 for engine machinery.

title: EU EMC Directive for Engine Electronics
description: Comply with EU EMC Directive for engine electronic systems.

title: EU Low Voltage Directive
description: Comply with LVD for engine electrical systems above 50V.

title: EU Pressure Equipment Directive
description: Comply with PED for engine pressure components above thresholds.

title: ATEX Equipment for Engines
description: Comply with ATEX Directive for engines used in explosive atmospheres.

title: IECEx Certification
description: Maintain IECEx certification for engines in explosive atmospheres.

title: API Spec 11D1 Subsurface Pumps
description: Apply API Spec 11D1 for subsurface sucker rod pumps.

title: ASME Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code
description: Apply ASME BPVC for engine boiler and pressure vessel components.

title: SCR System Compliance
description: Maintain SCR (Selective Catalytic Reduction) systems per OEM specifications.

title: EGR System Compliance
description: Maintain EGR (Exhaust Gas Recirculation) systems for emission control.

title: DPF Maintenance
description: Maintain DPF (Diesel Particulate Filter) per OEM regeneration schedules.

title: Anti-Tampering for Emissions
description: Comply with Clean Air Act anti-tampering provisions for emission systems.

title: Defeat Device Prohibition
description: Avoid defeat devices that bypass emission controls per Clean Air Act.

title: Lawful Basis for Customer Data
description: Document lawful basis for engine customer personal data processing.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Customer Transfers
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for engine customer data transfers outside EEA.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC for security.

title: Engines Manufacturing ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for engine design / IP / manufacturing systems.

title: Engine Design IP Encryption
description: Apply ISO 27001 encryption to engine design IP and trade secrets.

title: TISAX for Automotive Engine Suppliers
description: Maintain TISAX certification for automotive engine supplier information security.

title: AS5553 Counterfeit Parts Prevention
description: Apply AS5553 standard to prevent counterfeit electronic parts in engines.

title: AS6174 Counterfeit Materiel
description: Apply AS6174 standard to prevent counterfeit materiel in engines.

title: DFARS for Defense Engine Contractors
description: Apply DFARS 252.204-7012 cybersecurity to DoD engine contractor CUI.

title: CMMC Level 2 for DoD Engine Suppliers
description: Maintain CMMC Level 2 certification for DoD engine contracts handling CUI.

title: Engine ECCN Classification
description: Classify engine technology with Export Control Classification Numbers.

title: USML Category VIII Aircraft Engines
description: Apply USML Category VIII to military aircraft engines and propulsion technology.

title: EU AI Act for Engine Diagnostics AI
description: Apply EU AI Act transparency obligations to predictive maintenance AI.

title: TCFD Climate Disclosure
description: Disclose climate-related risks per TCFD framework.

title: EU CSRD Reporting
description: Report sustainability per EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive.

title: EU Carbon Border Adjustment
description: Comply with EU CBAM for carbon-intensive engine component imports.

title: EU Heavy-Duty Vehicle CO2
description: Meet EU heavy-duty vehicle CO2 reduction targets for engines.

title: Engines Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS for engine production continuity per ISO 22301.

title: Engines Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering OT and IT environments.

title: Methane Emissions for Engine OEMs
description: Report methane emissions from engine production per EPA GHG Reporting Rule.

title: DEF System Anti-Tampering
description: Prevent DEF system tampering per EPA tamper-detection requirements.

title: Engine Data Logger Standards
description: Apply ISO 23150 for standardized engine sensor data interfaces.
